interpretation.claim_boundary: phase8_ready rows are telemetry readiness only. N19 does not implement native boundary state, native support, selfhood, or Phase 8.
interpretation.main_read: Iteration 4 finds strong AP6 native-readiness for boundary telemetry: N16 side-state/edge telemetry, leakage/separability requirements telemetry, and breach/reclosure telemetry are NAT4 Phase 8-ready candidates. The original B4_C5 shared-medium row remains a NAT3 one-sided contract because N16 records basin A as internal and defers reverse basin perspective replay. N19 therefore preserves B4_C5 as useful source-backed geometry without promoting it to paired/native multi-basin separability or selfhood.

purpose: Classify N16 AP6 boundary side-state, leakage/separability, breach/reclosure, and shared-medium geometry native-readiness without opening Phase 8 or native support.
